creator: william88@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

I am really sorry this has taken so long. Unfortunately it was on hold
due to ffmpeg change.
Would you mind regenerating the whole patch against current revision?
If thats ok, please do not take into account all ffmpeg version, just
link against multimedia/ffmpeg, all the other versions (ffmpeg0,
ffmpeg1 and ffmpeg-devel) and going to be removed soon.

Thanks and sorry for the trouble.

-- 
William Grzybowski
------------------------------------------
Curitiba/PR - Brasil
